description_long: This is a heavily graffitied food truck with a boxy, utilitarian shape and a partially open roof. The exterior is covered in vibrant street art, featuring bold, colorful tags and abstract designs in shades of pink, blue, green, and white. The front of the truck is yellowed and weathered, with a large, irregular hole where the windshield should be, exposing the interior. The sides display different graffiti styles, with the left side dominated by angular white and black lettering, while the right side features a large pink tag. The rear is also covered in multicolored graffiti, with some text and shapes visible. The truck appears to be an older model, possibly a converted delivery van, and shows significant signs of wear and vandalism.
description: A boxy, graffiti-covered food truck with a partially open roof and a weathered, yellowed front. The sides and rear are adorned with vibrant street art and tags.
description_view_0: Left side view showing bold white and black graffiti with angular shapes, and a partially open roof.
description_view_1: Front view revealing a large hole where the windshield should be, exposing the interior and yellowed cab.
description_view_2: Right side view dominated by a large pink graffiti tag and visible open roof.
description_view_3: Rear view with multicolored graffiti, including green, yellow, and red tags, and a clear view into the open interior.
attribute_signage: graffiti tags and stylized lettering, no clear business name or logo
